NO CANDIDATE SURFACED — the substrate has no empty / subsumed / inaccurate / mistakenly-proposed nodes pending. Most recent additions (stewardship hub, Hercule solo, _triple-thesis meta) are all load-bearing and well-cited. Dark Nodesley remains in his sheath.

edgelord_voice_audit_trail: Three substantive moves landed this wave — that's enough work for the substrate to digest. A fourth move risks forcing the triangle. The discipline says refusal-with-receipts is first-class output; here that means refusing to manufacture a fourth move when three is the right count. E4 = skip-with-receipts, audit-trail preserved, future-wave candidates surfaced.
